title: Mustache Axolotls!
description: Adds mustaches to all the axolotl variants!
body:
This texture pack adds mustaches to all the different types of axolotls!

 

 

 

This texture pack is so epic because when your adventuring and you find a little friend (axolotl), you can turn this texture pack on and then your little axolotl friend will become a very good looking axolotl friend!
